site.name: AI Invention
site.tagline: Engineering growth systems for ambitious brands.

hero.title: Turn ambitious ideas into AI products, websites, and growth systems that ship.
hero.description: AI Invention helps modern teams launch revenue-ready digital experiences with custom AI solutions, conversion-focused websites, streamlined automations, and measurable growth campaigns.
hero.statLine: Serving 10+ countries across North America, Europe, the Middle East, and Asia.

services.name: AI Solutions
services.tagline: Tailored assistants, copilots, and knowledge workflows built around your business.
services.summary: Tailored assistants, knowledge bases, and AI workflows aligned to your operations.
services.details: We design practical AI systems that reduce manual load, accelerate response times, and make internal knowledge easy to use.
delivers: Custom GPT-style assistants for internal teams and customers
Knowledge retrieval systems that answer from your SOPs and documents
Automated workflows that trigger actions after AI decisions
howItWorks: We map your workflows, data sources, and business rules first.
We prototype the AI logic, prompts, and tools against real use cases.
We deploy with testing, handoff documentation, and analytics.
whoItsFor: Teams buried in repetitive questions or manual triage
Founders who need AI features inside an existing product or offer
Operations teams that want accuracy and speed without hiring sprawl

relatedInsights.title: When to build a custom AI workflow instead of buying another SaaS tool
relatedInsights.summary: A practical framework for deciding between packaged AI tools and custom systems.

relatedInsights.title: Why internal knowledge bases fail without retrieval design
relatedInsights.summary: The missing architecture decisions behind accurate, trustworthy AI answers.

services.name: Website Development
services.tagline: High-performance websites built to convert, scale, and support your sales process.
services.summary: High-performance websites built to convert, scale, and support your sales process.
services.details: From positioning to launch, we create polished web experiences with clear structure, fast load times, and CMS-friendly management.
delivers: Conversion-focused landing pages and multi-page marketing sites
Responsive front-end systems tuned for speed and clarity
Content structures that make ongoing updates easier for your team
howItWorks: We clarify your offer, audience, and conversion goals before design.
We build the visual system, page hierarchy, and responsive front end.
We connect forms, content controls, analytics, and launch support.
whoItsFor: Agencies and startups that need a premium digital storefront
Service businesses whose current site is outdated or hard to update
Teams launching new offers and needing fast go-to-market pages

relatedInsights.title: What high-converting service websites do differently
relatedInsights.summary: The page structure, proof placement, and copy choices that consistently improve conversion.

relatedInsights.title: Why design quality alone does not create pipeline
relatedInsights.summary: How positioning, speed, and information hierarchy influence results.

services.name: Automation
services.tagline: Connected systems that remove repetitive work across your sales and delivery stack.
services.summary: Connected systems that remove repetitive work across your sales and delivery stack.
services.details: We map bottlenecks, automate the handoffs, and give your team reliable processes instead of brittle one-off hacks.
delivers: Automated lead routing, enrichment, and follow-up flows
Back-office workflows for fulfillment, onboarding, and reporting
Cross-tool integrations that reduce copy-paste operations
howItWorks: We audit the process, systems, and failure points with your team.
We design the automation logic, edge cases, and ownership rules.
We deploy, document, and monitor the workflow in production.
whoItsFor: Small teams scaling faster than their manual process can handle
Founders who need cleaner handoffs between sales and delivery
Operations leaders reducing hidden time loss in day-to-day execution

relatedInsights.title: The hidden cost of manual lead qualification
relatedInsights.summary: Where time actually disappears and how automation changes response speed.

relatedInsights.title: How to make automations resilient instead of fragile
relatedInsights.summary: A checklist for workflows that survive growth, staff changes, and tool updates.

services.name: Digital Marketing
services.tagline: Campaigns, funnels, and reporting that turn attention into qualified demand.
services.summary: Campaigns, funnels, and reporting that turn attention into qualified demand.
services.details: We combine messaging, landing pages, analytics, and experimentation to move the right metrics with less guesswork.
delivers: Offer positioning, funnel messaging, and launch campaigns
Paid and organic growth systems backed by clean reporting
Experimentation plans that improve lead quality over time
howItWorks: We identify the offer, audience, and current conversion gaps.
We build the funnel assets, tracking, and campaign structure.
We optimize based on lead quality, CAC, and close-rate data.
whoItsFor: Businesses with demand but inconsistent conversion into pipeline
Founders launching a new offer that needs traction quickly
Teams that need marketing tied directly to business outcomes

relatedInsights.title: Why campaign performance improves when ops and marketing are connected
relatedInsights.summary: The advantage of pairing automation and attribution with top-of-funnel work.

relatedInsights.title: How to evaluate a funnel beyond clicks and impressions
relatedInsights.summary: The downstream metrics that matter when revenue is the goal.

trustBar.title: Trusted by growth teams, founders, and service businesses worldwide.

framework.title: The Invention Framework
framework.description: A branded delivery flow that keeps strategy, execution, and iteration tightly connected from kickoff to scale.

about.headline: We build the systems behind your next stage of growth.
about.body: AI Invention is a multidisciplinary agency focused on helping companies modernize how they attract, convert, and serve customers. Our team combines strategy, design, engineering, automation, and growth execution so clients can move faster without sacrificing quality.

team.name: Nadia Rahman
team.bio: Shapes client strategy, partnerships, and the long-range direction of the agency.

team.name: Marcus Vale
team.bio: Leads applied AI architecture, process discovery, and intelligent tooling rollouts.

team.name: Elena Brooks
team.bio: Guides the visual and messaging direction for websites, campaigns, and brand experiences.

team.name: Jonah Reed
team.bio: Owns workflow mapping, integrations, and the operational backbone behind client delivery.

contact.headline: Tell us what you want to build.
contact.body: Share your goals, timeline, and current challenges. We'll review the opportunity and get back to you with the next best step.

footer.brandBlurb: AI Invention builds AI products, websites, automations, and demand systems for ambitious teams.
footer.newsletterBlurb: Get product releases, AI workflow ideas, and launch notes from the team.
